title: ferray-ufunc: maximum/minimum have no nan propagation control
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy has both np.maximum (propagates NaN) and np.fmax (ignores NaN), and likewise np.minimum vs np.fmin. ferray-ufunc has all four: maximum, minimum, fmax, fmin. However, NumPy 2.0 also added np.max/np.min with a nan_policy parameter. Check that ferray's maximum/minimum correctly propagate NaN per IEEE 754 semantics (if either input is NaN, output is NaN) and that fmax/fmin correctly ignore NaN.
